name: CALAVO GROWERS INC
summary: Calavo Growers, Inc. is an agricultural company specializing in the sourcing, processing, and distribution of avocados and other fresh produce. The company operates through segments involving fresh avocados and prepared/packaged food products. Calavo serves retail, foodservice, and wholesale markets, and has operations involving international sourcing, including from Mexico, with exposure to trade policy, tariffs, and IVA tax considerations.
